articles.author: Devon Ivie
articles.title: Things Are Looking Up for Phil Collins and His Health
articles.description: Things are looking very much up for Phil Collins. The legend says he’s ‘totally mobile and healthy’ after several years of struggling with his health, although he still employs a 24-hour caregiver to assist him.
articles.content: Two hearts, one very good update: Phil Collins is healthier than ever, stating in a new BBC podcast interview that hes feeling his best in years and considering a return to music. Its an ongoing thin… [+1699 chars]

articles.title: T-Mobile pays $16 million fine for three years’ worth of data breaches
articles.description: Breaches in three consecutive years lead to $16M fine and new security protocols.
articles.content:
45
T-Mobile has agreed to pay a $15.75 million fine and improve its security in a settlement over a series of data breaches over three years that affected tens of millions of customers.

articles.author: NTB-Johan Falnes
articles.title: Tik Tok installert på flere mobiler i regjeringen
articles.description: USA frykter at brukerdata fra Tik Tok kan bli overført til Kina. I Norge har flere i regjeringen lastet ned appen – inkludert statsminister Erna Solberg.
articles.content:
smp-stories-top-widget
Med mer enn to milliarder nedlastinger er Tik Tok blitt en av verdens mest populære apper.
